# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in this repository, **do not** 
open a GitHub issue.

**Report it to the Security Team:**
- Slack: #security-incidents
- Email: security@yourcompany.com

You can expect an initial response within **24 hours**.

This repository is governed by [Company Name]'s internal Vulnerability 
Disclosure Policy. [Link to Vanta/Confluence policy doc]
